script_name: High Complexity RSQL ETL Script Example

lineage.logic: Load data from S3 into temporary staging table using PARQUET format and manifest file. IAM role used for access control. Time format set to auto-detect timestamps in data files. Error handling checks if data was loaded successfully by counting rows in the staging table. If no data is loaded, the process is aborted with a rollback and exit command.
Delete existing records in the target table that match the sales_id from the staging table. This step is part of the upsert process to ensure no duplicate records exist in the target table.
Insert all records from the staging table into the target table. This step completes the upsert process by adding new records to the target table.
